h05ac52e3gc61cg49dfg9abcg68552512ac39: So, we're making deals with vermin now?
h3bfc7d16g6fc4g4a42g85f9ga7b4cf05eac6: She's a way to infiltrate the goblins - nothing more.
h0b4ad691gb9c6g4e8fg8e6bg8a879a26c613: I still wish we'd just ripped her throat out, but I suppose you have a point.
h25ae34e5gb0f3g4550g98a9g846c36b6f6a3: To save our own skins? Absolutely.
h02e812abg001bg44d4gbe94g8529bb6d1545: Don't get me wrong, I'm all for self-interest.
h9197d2f3g9e58g4561ga795gd74b82553737: I just wish we could've made a deal with a wood nymph or - anything less vile, really.
hb1b824bbga28dg40adg9401gf684c17aab21: The tieflings would have killed her. We had no choice.
h17e22d7fg0753g4d5fg99b1gb1f361972d0e: We always have a choice. Don't blame me if you don't like the options.
